plugin_desc: Enlogic PDU and EN2.0 PDU network-service SNMP collection for devices under Enlogic PEN 38446. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The current MIB facts identify PDU nameplate, input phase, breaker, outlet, power status, external sensor and Smart Cabinet tables, but do not prove a stable shared scalar mapping for CPU, memory, fan or power health, so private health and PDU business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
